name: Lapis
long_description:
Lapis gives businesses the ability to generate on-brand advertising creatives using AI. It uses existing assets like logos, colors, fonts, and product images, and automatically creates image ads that match a company's visual identity and voice across Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp, LinkedIn, and Google.

With Lapis, businesses can rapidly iterate on creatives and A/B test at scale without being bottlenecked by design and creative capacity.

Lapis is used by 1,000+ marketing teams, from big businesses like Hyundai and Tata to small businesses around the world, and supports 15+ languages including English, Spanish, and Italian.
one_liner: AI that creates on-brand image ads
